CustomField.description: If Outbound_Tracking starts with 9400, USPS. If something else, UPS. Else Blank, then return blank. https://basecamp.com/2583453/projects/19794483/todos/515660831#comment_969026254
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Determines is Outbound Carrier is USPS or UPS
CustomField.label: Outbound Tracking Carrier
